sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52488" key="kalamew/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμ-εών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n52488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καλαμών</ref></xr>, condemned by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">144</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
